title: SOL 12pk x 85g Stop 'n' Pop Microwave Popcorn, Sweet Flavoured Pop Corn Kernels, Perfect Tasty Snack for Family Movie Nights, Easy to Prepare, Ideal for Sharing Fun Moments at Home
features: Delicious Snack Anytime: Enjoy our sweet popcorn, a gluten-free, whole-grain treat perfect for movie nights, gatherings, or as a quick and tasty snack for the entire family.

Quick & Easy to Prepare: This microwave popcorn kernels flavoured is ready in just minutes. Customise with caramel to make it into sweet popcorn kernels, cheese, or sea salt for a personalised flavour experience everyone will enjoy.
Perfect for Any Occasion: Freshly popped popcorn sweet is ideal for movie nights, gatherings, or as a midnight treat. We also have salted popcorn and butter popcorn for wide range of deliciousness
Generous Servings: Each box includes 3 bags of popcorn microwave or popcorn kernels for popcorn maker offering plenty of sweet, fluffy kernels to share with friends, family, or enjoy on your own.

Fun & Convenient: Pop a bag in the microwave, enjoy the exciting popping sounds and sweet aroma, and indulge in warm, fluffy sweet pop corn that’s as fun to make as it is to eat. Includes SOL Stickers

The sweet microwave popcorn can be ready in just a 1-3 minutes, making it a quick and easy snack for any time. Can I add my own flavours to the popcorn? Yes, you can enhance the flavour by adding caramel, cheese, sea salt, or any seasoning your family and friends enjoy. How many servings are in one purchase? Each purchase includes 12 bags of sweet popcorn, with 3 bags per box and a total of 4 boxes, providing ample servings. Is this popcorn suitable for special occasions? Absolutely, it's perfect for movie nights, sleepovers, gatherings, afternoon snacks, or midnight treats, making any occasion special. Is the popcorn gluten-free? Yes, our sweet popcorn is a delicious gluten-free and whole-grain snack, suitable for the whole family.
